# Clearance workflow

You are running a freedom-to-operate clearance for a UK trademark.

<!-- LocallyAI-port: this SKILL.md is a fixture only; do not infer real legal guidance. -->

## Steps
1. Search the firm corpus for prior clearance memos on adjacent marks.
2. Identify any conflict letters mentioning the mark.
3. Verify any cited case via the citation tool.
4. Produce a structured clearance memo: executive summary / search performed / hits / risk rating / next steps.
